title: anthyllis vulneraria f. affinis
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria f. affinis, also known as kidney vetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to Europe and Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of kidney and urinary tract issues due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria f. affinis include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve kidney function, and alleviate symptoms associated with urinary tract infections. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall urinary health and well-being.
